channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NMDC] NMDC Ltd Fixes New Iron Ore Prices for March 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

NMDC Ltd, in accordance with Regulation 30 of the Securities & Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, has announced the new prices for Iron Ore effective from 6th March 2026. The prices are as follows: Baila Lump (65.5%, 10-40 mm) will be Rs. 4,800/- Per Ton and Baila Fines (64%, -10 mm) will be Rs. 4,050/- Per Ton. It's important to note that these prices are exclusive of Royalty, DMF, NMEDT, Cess, Forest Permit Fee, transit fee, GST, environmental Cess and other taxes.

  • NMDC Ltd announces new Iron Ore prices for March 2026
  • Prices are exclusive of various taxes and fees
  • Baila Lump price set at Rs. 4,800/- Per Ton
  • Baila Fines price set at Rs. 4,050/- Per Ton

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NMDC LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [APLLTD] Alembic Pharmaceuticals Reports First Prescription Sale of Pivya® in US
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Alembic Pharmaceuticals Limited announced the first prescription-based sale of Pivya® (pivmecillinam) tablets, an oral prescription antibiotic, following its recent commercial launch in the United States of America. Pivya® is Alembic’s first branded pharmaceutical product in the US and is being marketed through Alembic Therapeutics LLC. The therapeutic category represents a large and stable market, accounting for approximately 30 million prescriptions annually in the US. Alembic has established an initial sales footprint across key territories in the US, with each territory focusing on high-prescribing physicians in women’s health and engaging a targeted base of prescribers. The Company plans a phased expansion of field force as prescription momentum builds, supported by targeted physician education and market access initiatives.

  • Alembic Pharmaceuticals reports first prescription sale of Pivya® in US
  • Pivya® is Alembic’s first branded pharmaceutical product in the US
  • Pivya® represents a first-line oral antibiotic option for the treatment of uncomplicated urinary tract infections (uUTIs) in women
  • Alembic has established an initial sales footprint across key territories in the US
  • Company plans a phased expansion of field force as prescription momentum builds

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ALEMBIC PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ASMS] Avio Smart Market Stack, Huwel Lifesciences to Launch Patented Molecular Diagnostic Products Across Healthcare Segments
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Avio Smart Market Stack Limited (ASMS) has initiated an expanded collaboration with Huwel Lifesciences to introduce a range of patented molecular diagnostic products across multiple healthcare segments in India. The collaboration follows a Shareholders’ Agreement under which they aim to jointly scale advanced diagnostic technologies and bring them to institutional and healthcare markets across the country. Huwel Lifesciences has developed multiple patented diagnostic technologies and is building a strong pipeline of new products. The company's capabilities span RT-PCR diagnostic kits, point-of-care molecular testing devices, and disease detection panels. Avio Smart Market Stack will support the go-to-market strategy, institutional engagement, and commercialization of these technologies. Over the coming years, ASMS and Huwel expect to introduce multiple diagnostic product lines across different disease segments, expanding the availability of indigenous molecular diagnostics across government health programs, hospital networks, diagnostic laboratories, and private healthcare providers.

  • Avio Smart Market Stack Limited (ASMS) and Huwel Lifesciences to launch patented molecular diagnostic products across multiple healthcare segments in India.
  • The collaboration follows a Shareholders’ Agreement to jointly scale advanced diagnostic technologies.
  • Huwel Lifesciences has developed multiple patented diagnostic technologies and is building a strong pipeline of new products.
  • Avio Smart Market Stack to support the go-to-market strategy, institutional engagement, and commercialization of these technologies.
  • The partnership aims to accelerate the availability of rapid, accurate, and affordable diagnostics for diseases such as tuberculosis, HIV, hepatitis, and other infectious conditions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BARTRONICS INDIA LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ANGELONE] Angel One Ltd Achieves Lifetime High Retail Equity Turnover Share in February 2026
item.description:
Angel One Ltd, a leading stockbroker, announced its monthly business updates for February 2026. The company has reported a sequential gain in its commodity segment market share and a lifetime high in its share of overall retail equity turnover. However, broader market activity was subdued, resulting in a decrease in average daily order run rate and the average client funding book. The updates were provided as per the management's review and the company intends to continue providing updates on a monthly basis.

  • Angel One Ltd reports a lifetime high in retail equity turnover share for February 2026.
  • The company records strong sequential gains in commodity segment market share.
  • Average daily order run rate and average client funding book decrease due to subdued market activity.
  • Updates provided as per the management's review.
  • Angel One Ltd to continue providing monthly business updates.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Angel One Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ACCELERATE] AccelerateBS India Ltd Subsidiary Acquires 100% Stake in Beanstalk Web Solutions LLC for INR 13.84 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

AccelerateBS India Ltd announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Accelerate Next Inc, has completed the acquisition of 100% stake in Beanstalk Web Solutions LLC, a US-based technology firm. The acquisition was made on March 06, 2026 (IST) for a cash consideration of INR 13.84 Crores (USD 1.5 Million). Beanstalk Web Solutions LLC is a premier USA-based Technology Firm headquartered in St. Louis, Missouri, with a decade of expertise in delivering end-to-end Digital Transformation, providing in-house Custom Web and Mobile Applications, Managed Cloud Hosting, and data-driven Digital Marketing Solutions. The acquisition is expected to support AccelerateBS India Ltd’s long-term growth, expansion, business development, and strengthen its global presence, enhancing consolidated revenues and providing access to new customers.

  • Accelerate Next Inc, a wholly-owned subsidiary of AccelerateBS India Ltd, acquires 100% stake in Beanstalk Web Solutions LLC
  • The acquisition was made for a cash consideration of INR 13.84 Crores (USD 1.5 Million)
  • Beanstalk Web Solutions LLC is a premier USA-based Technology Firm with a decade of expertise in Digital Transformation
  • The acquisition is expected to support AccelerateBS India Ltd’s long-term growth, expansion, and business development
  • The acquisition will enhance consolidated revenues and provide access to new customers

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Acceleratebs India Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [JONJUA] Promoter Harjinder Singh Jonjua Transfers Shares in Jonjua Overseas Limited
item.description:
Promoter Harjinder Singh Jonjua has transferred a portion of his holding in Jonjua Overseas Limited on 05/03/2026. The transfer is detailed in a disclosure pursuant to Regulation 29 (2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The transfer includes both shares and voting rights, and the details of the transaction are provided in the disclosure.

  • Promoter Harjinder Singh Jonjua transfers shares in Jonjua Overseas Limited
  • Transfer includes both shares and voting rights
  • Transaction details provided in the disclosure
  • Transfer made on 05/03/2026
  • Jonjua Overseas Limited shares listed on Bombay Stock Exchange - SME PLATFORM

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jonjua Overseas Ltd | Category: Transmission of Shares

item.title: [INDAGIV] Ind Agiv Commerce Ltd: Major Resignations and Appointments in Upcoming Board Meeting
item.description:
Ind Agiv Commerce Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting on 7th March 2026 at Kanara Business Centre, Ghatkopar East, Mumbai. The agenda includes the resignation of Ms. Sushila Rupani and the appointment of a new Director in her place. Additionally, Mr. Ranjan Chona will resign from his post as Executive Director. The meeting is scheduled for 2 PM.

  • Ind Agiv Commerce Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on 7th March 2026.
  • The meeting will discuss the resignation of Ms. Sushila Rupani and the appointment of a new Director.
  • Mr. Ranjan Chona will also resign from his post as Executive Director.
  • The meeting is set to take place at Kanara Business Centre, Ghatkopar East, Mumbai.
  • The agenda of the meeting includes significant changes in the company's leadership.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IND-AGIV COMMERCE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [INDAGIV] Ind Agiv Commerce Ltd: Board Meeting Scheduled for 07/03/2026 to Consider Resignations and Appointments
item.description:
Ind Agiv Commerce Ltd has informed BSE that a short period meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled on 07/03/2026 at Kanara Business Centre in Ghatkopar East, Mumbai. The agenda of the meeting includes the consideration of the resignation of Ms. Sushila Rupani and the appointment of a new Director in her place. Additionally, the resignation of Mr. Ranjan Chona from the post of Executive Director will also be discussed.

  • Ind Agiv Commerce Ltd scheduled a Board Meeting on 07/03/2026
  • The meeting will be held at Kanara Business Centre in Ghatkopar East, Mumbai
  • The resignation of Ms. Sushila Rupani and the appointment of a new Director will be considered
  • The resignation of Mr. Ranjan Chona from the post of Executive Director will also be discussed

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IND-AGIV COMMERCE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [UGROCAP] Ugro Capital to Acquire 100% Shareholding of Datasigns Technologies in Cash-only Deal
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ugro Capital Ltd is in the process of completing the acquisition of 100% shareholding of Datasigns Technologies Private Limited (DTPL), the technology platform operating MyShubhLife. The acquisition will be made through an Amended and Restated Share Purchase Agreement dated March 5, 2026, which provides for payment of INR 38.23 crores entirely in cash in a single tranche. This is a revision from the original SPA, which provided for a combination of cash and share swap in two tranches. The revision is part of UGRO's capital allocation approach to avoid equity dilution. The MyShubhLife platform, which is a key part of UGRO’s embedded finance ecosystem, has enabled loan disbursements with an AUM of approximately INR 1,720 crores as of December 31, 2025.

  • Ugro Capital to acquire 100% shareholding of Datasigns Technologies Private Limited
  • Transaction to be completed through an Amended and Restated Share Purchase Agreement
  • Consideration revised from INR 45 crores in two tranches to INR 38.23 crores in a single cash tranche
  • MyShubhLife platform is a key part of UGRO’s embedded finance ecosystem
  • MyShubhLife platform has enabled loan disbursements with an AUM of approximately INR 1,720 crores as of December 31, 2025

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ugro Capital Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [RPOWER] Reliance Power Ltd Announces Cessation of Wholly Owned Subsidiary Reliance Chittagong Power Company Limited, Bangladesh
item.description:
Reliance Power Ltd has disclosed under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 that it will cease to have Reliance Chittagong Power Company Limited, Bangladesh as its wholly owned subsidiary. The subsidiary contributed 35 lakhs to the net worth of the company in the last financial year ended March 31, 2025. The voluntary winding up of the subsidiary was intimated to the company on March 05, 2026.

  • Reliance Power Ltd to cease having Reliance Chittagong Power Company Limited, Bangladesh as its wholly owned subsidiary.
  • Reliance Chittagong Power Company Limited, Bangladesh contributed 35 lakhs to the net worth of Reliance Power Ltd in the last financial year ended March 31, 2025.
  • The subsidiary is being voluntarily wound up and the information was received by Reliance Power Ltd on March 05, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIANCE POWER LTD. | Category: Subsidiaries
